name: Midjourney API
what_it_does: Midjourney — AI image generation platform known for artistic, high-quality image outputs, accessible primarily via Discord bot interface with no official public REST API, though third-party unofficial APIs exist for programmatic access.
use_cases: Agents generating high-quality artistic concept art and visual assets via Midjourney's Discord bot integration
Brand visual creation — agents prompting Midjourney for marketing imagery, illustrations, and creative content
Product concept visualization — agents creating product mockup images from text descriptions for design review
Social media content — agents generating eye-catching visuals for social posts using Midjourney's aesthetic quality
Interior/architectural visualization — agents creating room and building concept renders from text descriptions
not_for: Programmatic API-first workflows — Midjourney has no official REST API; use Stability AI or DALL-E 3 for proper API access
High-volume automated generation — rate limits and Discord-based access make Midjourney unsuitable for batch automation
Consistent reproducible outputs — Midjourney's aesthetic varies; use Stable Diffusion with seeds for reproducibility
best_when: You specifically need Midjourney's distinctive high-quality aesthetic and have a human-in-the-loop workflow where Discord interaction is acceptable.
avoid_when: You need a proper REST API, batch processing, or programmatic control — use Stability AI, DALL-E 3, or Ideogram which have real APIs.

auth.notes: No official API. Access via Discord bot commands only. Third-party unofficial APIs use Discord account tokens or bot tokens — violates Midjourney and Discord ToS. Midjourney is developing an official API (alpha status as of 2025).

pricing.paid_tiers: Basic: $10/month (200 images); Standard: $30/month (unlimited relaxed); Pro: $60/month; Mega: $120/month
pricing.notes: Subscription required. GPU minutes consumed per generation. Fast vs relaxed generation modes. Unlimited is relaxed queue; fast generation has limits. No free tier since mid-2023.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrent jobs limited by plan; queue-based; fast hours limited per plan tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No official API — no API documentation. Discord bot has no programmatic error handling. Third-party wrappers have unreliable error handling. Not suitable for production agent workflows.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No API — no idempotency. Image generation is non-deterministic. Same prompt produces different images each generation.
known_agent_gotchas: No official REST API — any programmatic access uses unofficial Discord bot automation that violates ToS
Official API in alpha (limited access only as of 2025) — not publicly available for general agent use
Generation quality and style varies significantly with prompt wording — agents need prompt engineering expertise
Output format is Discord CDN URLs that expire — agents must download and store images immediately
Moderation filters reject prompts inconsistently — agent workflows must handle content rejections gracefully

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant platform. No official API — unofficial access via Discord tokens is a significant security risk (full account access, ToS violation). Not suitable for production security requirements.
